    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    C

    checkAnswer(String, String, Player, Player, LifePane) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Validates the player's answer against the current puzzle's solution.
    checkQuiz(String) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Checks the remaining questions and navigates to the next question or the results page.
    clear() - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Clears all UI components from the RootPane except for the primary background layer.
    createBackButton() - Method in class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Creates a "Back" button that returns the user to the title screen.
    createBackButton() - Method in class pane.ModeSelectionPane
    Creates a "Back" button with custom background images and hover effects.
    createDifficultyButton(String, GameMode) - Method in class pane.ModeSelectionPane
    Creates a styled button for a specific game difficulty or mode.
    currentFilter - Static variable in class utils.Goto
    The current key event filter used to handle specific key inputs (e.g., Buzz-in keys).
    currentLevel - Variable in class mode.GameModeSelector
    The currently selected difficulty level or game mode.
    currentQuestion - Variable in class utils.DigitalTimer
    The specific puzzle currently being timed.
    customPuzzleButton - Variable in class pane.TitleScreenPane
    The button used to navigate to the custom puzzle creation and management page.
    CustomPuzzleEntry(long, GameMode, BasePuzzle) - Constructor for class utils.Goto.CustomPuzzleEntry
    Constructs a new CustomPuzzleEntry.
    customPuzzlePage() - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Navigates to the custom puzzle management page.
    CustomPuzzlePane - Class in pane
    The CustomPuzzlePane class provides a user interface for managing and creating custom puzzles.
    CustomPuzzlePane() - Constructor for class pane.CustomPuzzlePane
    Constructs a new CustomPuzzlePane.
    CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox - Class in pane
    Represents a container for a selected puzzle image and its associated hint field.
    customPuzzles - Static variable in class utils.Goto
    The list of custom puzzles created during the session.
